response.global_analysis: 1. JSON Match: Audio for 'AiScream' phonetically matches the provided reference lyrics. 2. JSON Usage: Fully utilized the provided lyrics for 'AiScream'; performed manual transcription and translation for the second song 'Monitoring' as it was not included in the reference lyrics. 3. Timing & Pacing: Timed subtitles strictly to vocal bursts; included a subtitle for the prominent on-screen title card of the second song during the transition.

subtitles.original: フブちゃん！
何が好き？
チョコミント よりも あ・な・た

subtitles.original: スクリーム！ アイスクリーム！
La la la la la love love...
subtitles.english: La la la la la love love...

subtitles.original: モニタリング (Best Friend Remix)
ねぇあたし知ってるよ きみがひとり涙してるの
subtitles.english: Hey, I know. I know you're crying all alone.

subtitles.original: 知ってるよ ピクンピクン震えてさ 声もだだ漏れなんだわ
subtitles.english: I know. You're shaking and trembling, and your voice is leaking out.

subtitles.original: 正直に言っちゃえば バレてるんだし言っちゃえば
subtitles.english: To be honest, it's already obvious, so just say it.

subtitles.original: 聞いてんの？ 普通普通 平気だよ みんなわかってないだけ
subtitles.english: Are you listening? It's okay, it's normal. Everyone else just doesn't get it.

subtitles.original: うつ
もしもし。 ねえ、大丈夫？
んー、心配だから今からそっち行くね
subtitles.english: Hmm, I'm worried, so I'm coming over now.

subtitles.original: ねぇあたし知ってるよ きみがひとり涙してるの
subtitles.english: Hey, I know. I know you're crying all alone.

subtitles.original: 知ってるよ クスンクスン凹んでさ 弱音ヒトからいんじゃない？
subtitles.english: I know. You're sobbing and feeling down, isn't it okay to show some weakness?

subtitles.original: 朝が来るまで一緒トーク もっと泣いたって
subtitles.english: We'll talk together until morning. Even if you cry more,

subtitles.original: 何度だって受け止めてあげる もう我慢しないでいっぱい吐いてね
subtitles.english: I'll catch you every time. Don't hold back anymore, let it all out.

subtitles.original: うわ！
お願いきみが欲しいの 慰めさせてベストフレンド 愛の才能で
subtitles.english: Please, I want you. Let me comfort you, best friend, with the talent of love.

subtitles.original: 泣いてくれるかい きみのつらい 抱きしめたい ねぇいいでしょ？
subtitles.english: Will you cry for me? Your pain, I want to embrace it, is that okay?

subtitles.original: 分け合って 乗り越えたいんだ 暖かくなれば
subtitles.english: I want to share it and overcome it together. If it gets warmer...

subtitles.original: うわ！
お願いきみが欲しいの 笑い飛ばしてホップステップジャンプ最高ぜ
subtitles.english: Please, I want you. Let's laugh it off, hop-step-jump, it's the best!

subtitles.original: 分けてくれるかい きみに重い 暗い思い ねぇいいでしょ？
subtitles.english: Will you share it with me? Your heavy, dark thoughts, is that okay?

subtitles.original: 寄り添って 救いたいんだ 暖かくなれば
subtitles.english: I want to be close and save you. If it gets warmer...

subtitles.original: 見たい見たい見たい見たい...
subtitles.english: I want to see, I want to see, I want to see...

subtitles.original: 見たいのきみの中
subtitles.english: I want to see inside of you

subtitles.original: 見たい見たい見たい見たい...
subtitles.english: I want to see, I want to see, I want to see...

subtitles.original: ねぇあたし知ってるよ きみがひとり悔しがってるの
subtitles.english: Hey, I know. I know you're feeling frustrated all alone.

subtitles.original: 知ってるよ グスングスン終わるまで きみを決して諦めない
subtitles.english: I know. Until the sobbing ends, I will never give up on you.

subtitles.original: ねぇあたし知ってるよ きみはできる子知ってるよ
subtitles.english: Hey, I know. I know you're a capable person.

subtitles.original: つらい時は 弱いくらいでちょうどいい あたしきみの味方だよ
subtitles.english: When it's tough, being a bit weak is just right. I'm on your side.

subtitles.original: うわ！
お願いきみが欲しいの 名前を呼んでよ いつだって会いに参上
subtitles.english: Please, I want you. Call my name, I'll come to see you anytime.

subtitles.original: きみはひとりかい？ それは違う ひとりじゃない もういいでしょ？
subtitles.english: Are you alone? That's not right. You're not alone, is that enough?

subtitles.original: ソロプレイはおしまいなんだ 暖かくなれば
subtitles.english: Solo play is over now. If it gets warmer...

subtitles.original: きみがどんなときも あたし側にいるわ
subtitles.english: No matter when, I'll be by your side.

subtitles.original: いつも見守っているわ そうよ怖くないのよ
subtitles.english: I'm always watching over you. That's right, there's nothing to be afraid of.

subtitles.original: Mwah! お願い
